/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/texgenpack.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libtexgenpack.so -o libtexgenpack.so "CMakeFiles/texgenpack.dir/fetchcontent/texgenpack-src/astc.c.o" "CMakeFiles/texgenpack.dir/fetchcontent/texgenpack-src/bptc.c.o" "CMakeFiles/texgenpack.dir/fetchcontent/texgenpack-src/calibrate.c.o" "CMakeFiles/texgenpack.dir/fetchcontent/texgenpack-src/compare.c.o" "CMakeFiles/texgenpack.dir/fetchcontent/texgenpack-src/compress.c.o" "CMakeFiles/texgenpack.dir/fetchcontent/texgenpack-src/dxtc.c.o" "CMakeFiles/texgenpack.dir/fetchcontent/texgenpack-src/etc2.c.o" "CMakeFiles/texgenpack.dir/fetchcontent/texgenpack-src/file.c.o" "CMakeFiles/texgenpack.dir/fetchcontent/texgenpack-src/half_float.c.o" "CMakeFiles/texgenpack.dir/fetchcontent/texgenpack-src/image.c.o" "CMakeFiles/texgenpack.dir/fetchcontent/texgenpack-src/mipmap.c.o" "CMakeFiles/texgenpack.dir/fetchcontent/texgenpack-src/rgtc.c.o" "CMakeFiles/texgenpack.dir/fetchcontent/texgenpack-src/texgenpack.c.o" "CMakeFiles/texgenpack.dir/fetchcontent/texgenpack-src/texture.c.o"  liblibfgen.a libpthreads4w.a
